testimonial.text: Before Apprexia, I analyzed every investment using multiple spreadsheets. Today I get a clear picture of value, risks and negotiation potential in just a few seconds.

pricing.title: Choose the plan that fits your
pricing.subtitle: Start for free with the Apprexia Score™, then unlock a detailed analysis when you are ready to make a decision.
pricing.footer: Each Premium analysis includes the Apprexia Score™, estimated value, market analysis, real estate comparables, profitability evaluation, identified risks and a clear recommendation: Invest, Negotiate or Avoid.
